name: Along the River of Gold
text:
Water role only.
Action: During a conflict at a [water] province, choose a participating character – switch that character's base [mil] and [pol] skill until the end of the conflict.

name: Kuni Ritsuko
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender, choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.

name: Iron Mine
text: Interrupt: When a character you control would leave play – sacrifice this holding instead.

name: Silver-Tongued Magistrate
text: While this character is attacking, each other character that has no fate on it does not count its skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: Togashi Mendicant
text: Reaction: After the fate phase begins – look at the top 3 cards of your dynasty deck. Then, put them back in any order.

name: Beastmaster Matriarch
text: This character gets +2 [mil] for each ring in each opponent's claimed ring pool.

name: Asako Tsuki
text: Reaction: After the [water] ring is claimed, choose a Scholar character – honor that character.

name: Kanjo District
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
Action: During a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor. Choose a participating character – bow that character and move it home.

name: Sake House Confidant
text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor – each Shinobi character you control gets +2[pol] until the end of the conflict.

name: Illustrious Plagiarist
text: Action: Choose the topmost event in an opponent's conflict discard pile – this character gains each of that event's action abilities until the end of the phase.

name: Shinjo Scout
text: Reaction: After you gain fate for passing in the dynasty phase – gain 1 fate.

name: Miya Satoshi
text: Action: Discard cards from your dynasty deck until you discard an Imperial card. Then, discard a card in a non-stronghold province you control and put the discarded Imperial card into that province, faceup.

name: Pillow Book
text: Action: While attached character is participating in a conflict – reveal the top card of your conflict deck until the end of the conflict. While it remains revealed, you may play that card as if it were in your hand.

name: Seal of the Dragon
text: Attached character gains the  clan symbol and the Monk trait.

name: Written in the Stars
text: Action: Select one – place 1 fate on each unclaimed ring with no fate or remove 1 fate from each unclaimed ring.

name: A Legion of One
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a character that is participating on your side alone – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +3[mil]. You may remove 1 fate from that character to resolve this ability twice.

name: Oni Mask
text:
Seeker role only.
Attach to a character you control.
Action: During a conflict, remove 1 fate from attached character. Choose a participating character – treat that character as if its printed text box were blank (except Traits) until the end of the conflict.

name: Seal of the Unicorn
text: Attached character gains the  clan symbol and the Cavalry trait.

name: Talisman of the Sun
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: During a conflict in which you are the defending player, bow this attachment – move the contested ring to another eligible province and reveal it, if able. That province is now the attacked province.

name: Mono no Aware
text: Action: Remove 1 fate from each character. Draw 1 card. (Max 1 per round).
